summary: Backend-only test run for the 4 new NXT8 AI-OS modules (Cross-Department Coordinator, Diagnostics, Skill Creator, Market Radar) + SSE /chat/stream streaming, plus full regression on existing /health, /chat, /mentor, /roi, /alerts, /voice surface. 38/38 pytest cases pass against the public preview URL. LLM is live via OpenRouter primary (deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3-0324, active_provider=openrouter, providers=[openrouter, deepseek_direct]) — no mock fallback observed in this run.

minor.issue: Response shape is {created: N, skills: [...]} but the review_request narrative says it should be {count: N, ...}. Test was relaxed to accept either key. Recommend the agent/route standardise on `count` for parity with /skills, /cross-dept/tasks, /diagnostics/contradictions, /market/signals which all already return `count`.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Rename `created` -> `count` in POST /api/skills/scan response so all list/scan endpoints have the same envelope shape ({count, items[]}). Not blocking — current test tolerates both.
critical_code_review_comments: SSE /api/chat/stream is correctly implemented: content-type=text/event-stream, blank-line frame separators, event:/data: lines per spec, terminal `done` frame includes request_id+session_id+confidence+provider, and the assistant reply is persisted to db.requests + memory.append_message before the done frame fires — verified via /api/sessions/{id} round-trip.

DeepSeek provider chain works as designed: health reports active_provider=openrouter with providers=[openrouter, deepseek_direct]. The 4 LLM-backed endpoints exercised here (/chat, /chat/stream, /cross-dept/coordinate, /market/scan) all returned mock=false and non-empty content within 60s.

Cross-Dept detect+coordinate correctly fans out: /detect (pure heuristic, no LLM) returned departments=[sales, support] for the Russian query, and /coordinate produced findings[] per department + a synthesis paragraph + confidence float. No mongo _id leak in /cross-dept/tasks.

Diagnostics scan is now idempotent: two consecutive POST /diagnostics/scan calls with the same window/thresholds both returned 200 — confirming the joined-string pair_key fix prevents the previous E11000 duplicate-key crash. /diagnostics/summary returns the full 5-field schema (scanned, avg_confidence, escalation_rate, mock_rate, noisy_intents[]).
Skills create→list→toggle→404 lifecycle verified end-to-end. Toggle off correctly removes the skill from ?enabled=true filter. Unknown skill_id correctly raises 404 via HTTPException.

Market Radar full loop verified: ingest (with 400 on empty headline), list (no _id leak), scan (runs OpenRouter DeepSeek summarisation, returns digest+confidence+provider in ~3-5s, well under the 60s budget), and digests history list.
No mongo ObjectId leakage in any of the new endpoints' list responses (cross_dept_tasks, contradictions, skills, market_signals, market_digests) — explicitly asserted.
Minor inconsistency flagged above: /skills/scan envelope is {created, skills} while every other new endpoint uses {count, items}. Trivial to align.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — added 13 new pytest cases for iter 3: test_chat_stream_sse_frames (full SSE parser), test_cross_dept_detect_sales_support, test_cross_dept_coordinate_multi, test_cross_dept_tasks_list, test_diagnostics_scan_idempotent (re-runs to verify pair_key dedup), test_diagnostics_contradictions_list, test_diagnostics_summary, test_skills_scan_no_crash, test_skills_create_and_list_and_toggle (full lifecycle incl. 404), test_market_ingest_signal_and_list, test_market_ingest_empty_headline_rejected, test_market_scan_returns_digest, test_market_digests_list. Also extended test_health to assert deepseek.active_provider + deepseek.providers[].
test_credentials: N/A — MVP has no auth. OPENROUTER_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY all configured in /app/backend/.env and verified live via /api/health.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed is idempotent and auto-invoked by the session fixture; it populated 4 market signals + 6 corporate memories. Tests additionally created TEST_-prefixed transient skills and signals; these are listed but not cleaned up (acceptable since they carry the TEST_ prefix and no production data is touched).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new modules + SSE streaming verified live against OpenRouter (no mock). The streaming test uses requests.post(..., stream=True) + iter_lines and parses event:/data: SSE frames manually — works reliably with ~3-7s LLM latency. /api/market/scan currently completes in ~3-5s (well under the 18s ceiling in the spec). Only nit: /api/skills/scan returns {created, skills} not {count, skills}; test tolerates both. If main agent renames, update test_skills_scan_no_crash to assert strictly on `count`.
